Cross-reference for turismo classes, object properties and data properties back to ToC

This section provides details for each class and property defined by turismo.

accesories and complementsc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://ontologia.segittur.es/turismo/def/core#AccesoriesAndComplements

has super-classes
retail and fashion c

Accommodationc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://ontologia.segittur.es/turismo/def/core#Accommodation

has super-classes
Tourism Service c
has sub-classes
Lodge c, Motel c, Residence c, Resort c, Vacation rental c, aparthotel c, camping c, glamping c, guest house c, hostal c, hostel c, hotel c, mountain shelter c, parador c
is in domain of
capacity of the accommodation op, offers additional accommodation service op, offers meal plan op, offers room op, registration op

accommodation capacityc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://ontologia.segittur.es/turismo/def/core#AccommodationCapacity

has super-classes
thing c
is in range of
capacity of the accommodation op

accommodation registrationc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://ontologia.segittur.es/turismo/def/core#AccommodationRegistration

has super-classes
thing c
is in domain of
check-in hours dp, check-out hours dp, online dp, onsite dp
is in range of
registration op

acknowledgementc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://ontologia.segittur.es/turismo/def/core#Acknowledgement

has sub-classes
Certification c, Label c, Rating c
is in domain of
recognized by dp
is in range of
has Acknowledgement op

Activityc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://ontologia.segittur.es/turismo/def/core#Activity

is in domain of
activity type op, nature activity type op, water activity type op
is in range of
offers activity op

additional informationc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://ontologia.segittur.es/turismo/def/core#AdditionalInformation

is in domain of
curiosites dp, frequently asked questions dp
is in range of
hasAdditionalInformation op

airlinec back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://ontologia.segittur.es/turismo/def/core#Airline

has super-classes
passenger transport company c
is in domain of
Airplane op, offers additional airline service op

IRI: https://ontologia.segittur.es/turismo/def/core#Airplane

has super-classes
means of transport c
is in domain of
offers additional ariplane service op

Airplane op

concept schemec back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: http://www.w3.org/2008/05/skos#ConceptScheme

has super-classes
thing c
has members
access type ni, accommodation service type ni, adversity type ni, airline service type ni, airplane service type ni, airport service type ni, amusement park service type ni, aquarium service type ni, art gallery service type ni, beach service type ni, beach type ni, bus operator service type ni, bus service type ni, bus station service type ni, cabin type ni, camping specialty ni, carpool service type ni, civic building type ni, congress centre service type ni, cruise ship cabin service type ni, cruise ship service type ni, cuisine type ni, culture center service type ni, d m c service type ni, destination type ni, education level ni, educational service type ni, event attendance service type ni, event organization service type ni, event service type ni, event type ni, exhibition hall service type ni, ferry operator service type ni, ferry service type ni, ferry type ni, garden category ni, garden style ni, gender ni, gym service type ni, handi craft service type ni, health and beauty service type ni, health resort service type ni, historical and culture service type ni, historical landmark or building type ni, hotel specialty ni, lake service type ni, leisure and culture service type ni, local business service type ni, meal plan ni, means of transport ni, menu options ni, micromobility service type ni, military building type ni, movie theatre service type ni, museum service type ni, museum type ni, nature activity type ni, parcel and courier service type ni, parking facility service type ni, parking security type ni, parking type ni, party and entertainment service type ni, passenger transport service type ni, place of worship type ni, planetarium service type ni, price class ni, professional position ni, propulsion type ni, railway company service type ni, rate type ni, reservation type ni, restaurant service type ni, retail and fashion service type ni, river service type ni, room service type ni, room type ni, saturation level ni, seabed type ni, shipment scope ni, socket type ni, sport service type ni, stadium service type ni, station type ni, status ni, swimming pool service type ni, theatre service type ni, tour guide service type ni, tour service type ni, touriat intermediary service type ni, tourism resource of interest service type ni, tourist destination service type ni, tourist or related facility service type ni, train service type ni, train station service type ni, transmission type ni, transport infrastructure service type ni, transport service type ni, travel agency service type ni, traveller class ni, vehicle experience service type ni, vehicle rental company service type ni, vehicle rental service type ni, vehicle service type ni, vehicle type ni, vineyard service type ni, water activity type ni, winery service type ni, workshop type ni, zoo service type ni

thing c

offers additional room service op, room type op

offers room op

sport facilityc back to ToC or Class ToC

has super-classes
facility c

basketball court c, bowling alley c, climbing wall c, engine circuit c, equestrian club c, football field c, golf course c, gym c, multiadventure centre c, paddel court c, race track c, running track c, shooting range c, skate park c, skating rink c, sports centre c, stadium c, swimming pool c, tennnis court c, winter sport resort c, yachting port c

tourc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://ontologia.segittur.es/turismo/def/core#Tour

has super-classes
Tourism Service c
is in domain of
dramatised tour dp, meeting point op, offers additional tour service op
is in range of
tour op

tour guidec back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://ontologia.segittur.es/turismo/def/core#TourGuide

has super-classes
Organisation c
is in domain of
offers additional tourist guide service op, registration number dp, tour op

Tourism Resourcec back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://ontologia.segittur.es/turismo/def/core#TourismResource

Class that groups in a general manner all resources that are relevant for the tourism sector, so as to group all common properties to all these resources.
has super-classes
has sub-classes
facility c, historical and cultural resource c, local business c, natural resource c
is in domain of
access type op, offers additional tourism resource of interest service op, public access dp

Tourism Servicec back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://ontologia.segittur.es/turismo/def/core#TourismService

Class that groups in a general manner all services that are relevant for the tourism sector, so as to group all common properties to all these services.
has super-classes
has sub-classes
Accommodation c, Restaurant service c, destination experience c, event c, holiday package c, public service c, tour c, tourist destination service c, transport service c, vehicle rental service c

touristc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://ontologia.segittur.es/turismo/def/core#Tourist

has super-classes
person role c
is in domain of
average daily expenditure dp, brings baggage dp, hires tour package dp, lenght of stay op, preferred travel season dp, travel frequency dp, travel unit op

tourist attraction sitec back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://ontologia.segittur.es/turismo/def/core#TouristAttractionSite

has super-classes
historical and cultural resource c

tourist destinationc back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://ontologia.segittur.es/turismo/def/core#TouristDestination

has super-classes
thing c
is in domain of
destination type op, has rules and tips for tourists op, offers additional tourist destination service op, offers destination experience op, offers tourist destination service op, population dp, weather forecast op

IRI: https://ontologia.segittur.es/turismo/def/core#TouristDestinationService

has super-classes
Tourism Service c
is in domain of
tourist card dp
is in range of
offers tourist destination service op

offers additional tourist intermediary service op, offers holiday package op

facility c

airport c, bicycle sharing system c, bike lane c, bus station c, electric vehicle charging station c, gas station c, parking c, passenger terminal c, public transport stop c, taxi stand c, train station c
is in domain of
offers additional transport infrastructure service op, transport infrastructure authority dp

transport routec back to ToC or Class ToC

IRI: https://ontologia.segittur.es/turismo/def/core#TransportRoute

has super-classes
is in domain of
destination station dp, earliest departure dp, last departure dp, stops dp

access typeop back to ToC or Object Property ToC

IRI: https://ontologia.segittur.es/turismo/def/core#accessType

has domain
Tourism Resource c
has range
concept c and (in scheme op value access type)

activity typeop back to ToC or Object Property ToC

IRI: https://ontologia.segittur.es/turismo/def/core#activityType

has sub-properties
nature activity type op, water activity type op
has domain
Activity c
has range
concept c

adversityop back to ToC or Object Property ToC

IRI: https://ontologia.segittur.es/turismo/def/core#adversity

has domain
rules and tips for tourists c
has range
concept c and (in scheme op value adversity type)

Airplaneop back to ToC or Object Property ToC

IRI: https://ontologia.segittur.es/turismo/def/core#airplane

has domain
airline c
has range
airplane c

allowed vehicle typeop back to ToC or Object Property ToC

IRI: https://ontologia.segittur.es/turismo/def/core#allowedVehicleType

has domain
electric vehicle charging station c or parking c
has range
concept c and (in scheme op value vehicle type)

area servedop back to ToC or Object Property ToC

IRI: https://ontologia.segittur.es/turismo/def/core#areaServed

has domain
destination experience c or holiday package c or micromobility c or tourist destination c or weather forecast c
has range
Tourism Resource c or tourist destination c or transport facility c
is also defined as
data property

has domain
beach c

c: Classes
op: Object Properties
dp: Data Properties
ni: Named Individuals
